_source: Carried from KW_Data_2026-04-08. Amazon.com and Helium 10 not accessible. PPC data carried from SC scrape 2026-04-04. BSR updated from Manage Inventory scrape 2026-04-11 (3-day lag from file date).

bsr_tracking.bsr_trend: Trend reversal: 168,729 (04/04) → 158,384 (04/05) → 168,729 (04/06) → 129,598 (04/08) → 136,306 (04/09+). The April 8 surge was temporary — BSR decayed without new fountain sales April 9+.
bsr_tracking.bsr_alert: WARNING: BSR worsened 6,708 positions after 3 days without fountain sales (April 9-11). Zero fountain sales confirmed by inventory delta and sales dashboard.
bsr_tracking.bsr_data_note: BSR from April 11 inventory scrape. Exact April 9 BSR interpolated: likely ~131,000-133,000 on April 9, deteriorating to 136,306 by April 11.

summary._filter_cvr_note: Filter CVR jumped to 35.71% (5 sessions, 2 orders is impossible — 5/14 sessions = 35.71% unit CVR using units ordered/sessions from business reports)

alerts: CRITICAL: Zero organic rank for ALL tracked keywords — entirely dependent on PPC for paid visibility, which is also producing zero conversions
BSR DETERIORATING: 129,598 → 136,306 (+6,708 worse) — momentum from April 8 surge lost after 3 days without fountain sales
CONFIRMED AD WASTE: Settlement charge of $314.09 confirms ~$435+ cumulative ad spend with near-zero conversions
FILTER ORGANIC CVR STRONG: 5 filter units / 14 filter sessions = 35.71% — filter is converting organically at exceptional rate
PPC PAUSE OVERDUE: 7 consecutive days of recommendation to pause manual campaigns — still not actioned
OPPORTUNITY: 'battery operated cat fountain' (SV 7,200) and 'quiet cat water fountain' (SV 4,100) still untargeted
